This file contains a list of RefSeq accession numbers for all proteomes used in the test datasets (see tests/testdata/*/fasta).

tests/testdata/ThreeByThree/fasta:
GCF_000008725.1 (Chlamydia trachomatis)
GCF_000005845.2 (Escherichia coli)
GCF_001457635.1 (Streptococcus pneumoniae)

tests/testdata/herpes/fasta:
GCF_000859985.2 (Human alphaherpesvirus 1)
GCF_000846365.1 (Human betaherpesvirus 6B)
GCF_000900815.1 (Cyprinid herpesvirus 2)
GCF_000846065.1 (Ostreid herpesvirus 1)
GCF_000886195.1 (Anguillid herpesvirus 1)
GCF_000869245.1 (Ranid herpesvirus 2)
GCF_000900375.1 (Abalone herpesvirus Victoria/AUS/2009)
GCF_001443905.1 (Elephant endotheliotropic herpesvirus 4)
GCF_000843985.2 (Equid gammaherpesvirus 2)
GCF_000918475.1 (Chimpanzee herpesvirus strain 105640)
GCF_027938535.1 (Equid herpesvirus 6)
GCF_000839325.1 (Ictalurid herpesvirus 1)
GCF_000838825.1 (Alcelaphine gammaherpesvirus 1)
GCF_004787155.1 (Retroperitoneal fibromatosis-associated herpesvirus)
GCF_000872045.1 (Human herpesvirus 4 type 2)

tests/testdata/TenPhages/fasta:
 GCF_000844825.1    (Escherichia phage T7)
 GCF_000845205.1    (Inovirus M13)
